Title: Grok Code Fast 1 is now available in Copilot Free auto model selection
EnhancedContent:
Grok Code Fast 1 is generally available to Copilot Free plans via [Copilot auto model selection](https://docs.github.com/copilot/concepts/auto-model-selection).

This model is now added to the list of possible models that Copilot might choose in auto model selection. It’s part of **Auto** in GitHub Copilot Chat on Visual Studio Code, Visual Studio, JetBrains IDEs, Xcode, and Eclipse.

To learn more about the models available in Copilot, see [our documentation on models](https://docs.github.com/copilot/reference/ai-models/supported-models?utm_source=model-release-announcement&utm_medium=changelog&utm_campaign=newmodels) and get started with Copilot today.

## Share your feedback

Join the [GitHub Community](https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/categories/copilot-conversations?utm_source=model-release-announcement&utm_medium=changelog&utm_campaign=newmodels) to share your feedback.
